reviews.review_description:
All the classic seaside games, with authentic physics, here, in one place, in VR!

I know it's not exactly high brow, I mean I'm normally playing intense shooters or open world RPGs etc, but in this crazy messed up world right now there's an awful lot to be said for something that's just **good old fashioned wholesome fun.**

It's great fun solo, but definitely even better with friends.  I bought this for myself, and then within a day I had already bought and gifted a copy to a friend to get them to join me, and now they're hooked too.

Honestly, this is so well done, so very authentic, right down to winning tickets that you can use to redeem for trinkets and toys, that really work -- I'm still trying to save them up to get the mini Theramin, but nope, I keep getting getting distracted by the other smaller prizes like the mooing cow can and the handheld ball game and so on (because although I'm 50 it turns out I'm also still 5.)

This game really deserves so much more publicity and attention.  It's clearly been a labour of love for the developer, so tidy, accessible, simple, and polished.

It's a must buy!

reviews.review_title: Most Played Game! Pure Arcade Experience
reviews.review_description: I can't get enough of Pierhead Arcade Quest 2. It's absolutely an awesome game and it's the VR arcade experience I didn't know I needed! Now it's currently my most played game. I've played every arcade game, and each one works flawlessly with excellent physics. I really appreciate that everything's included upfront, no sneaky DLC. I've had many 'just one more game' sessions that turned into hours, often playing comfortably from my bed thanks to the setting to effortlessly adjust the users height. This is how VR arcade ports should be done!

reviews.review_title: So fun! Nothing to build, just play
reviews.review_description: I’ve been looking for a VR arcade game that doesn’t involve story mode/ buying/ building. I just want to walk around a virtual arcade and play games. That’s exactly what this is :) it’s super fun and feels like you’re at a boardwalk arcade. Unlocking the rooms is rewarding without being frustrating or hitting paywalls. The coin pusher game with aliens and spaceships is my favorite, I play it daily. I’d love to see updates in the future - If not new rooms perhaps new modes for existing games, and the ability to play your own music/ mute game sounds would be sweet. Kudos to the devs for creating one of my favorite VR experiences. Looking forward to Pierhead Arcade 3!

I've enjoyed this game since it first came out. I'm sure I have over 300 hours of gameplay between meta and steam.
I'm on the older side, but it is enjoyable every time.

You get 5 Stars… when you fix this. EVERYTHING works well except for one thing: Zombie Shootout. I played this on the PS4 and I was always in the Top 10 on the leaderboard. I was good and it was so much fun. Now, on the Meta Quest, everything about this game works better and there’s much more content. However, when I went to play my old favorite Zombie Shootout, the GUNS DON’T SHOOT! I get ZERO POINTS. It’s literally UNPLAYABLE! I will change my review to 5 stars if you fix this.

Also, the crossbow absolutely freaks out on the Camelot game like a cat being electrocuted. It’s completely unusable.
Great game in 2022 but now it’s dead nobody plays it anymore it’s just not fun
My kids love it....
Redemption style arcade games! Soooo much value! I'm so glad I got this one. Much love to the makers of this great arcade experience!
I just bought this less than a week ago and you can’t do anything in it. It doesn’t work. I’ve tried to go through a door and I just go back out in the hallway again. I want my money back.

reviews.review_title: too many pirated users play online
reviews.review_description:
Hi, I am Raymond Ng, from Hong Kong.

I know that too many pirated users can also play online, which is really unfair.  I have two  Q3 and bought 2 copies for this game,
The price of the game is not affordable;
It is extremely unfair. 

The developers need to review this serious situation. Why can pirated users also play online?
please follow and resolve.


and, please upgrade your game to Quest 3 for better realistic visuals

reviews.review_title: Crying out for a Mixed Reality Update
reviews.review_description: Fantastic game that would be taken to another level if you could bring the machines and toys into your own real environment. Please, please, please? Would pay for the upgrade as DLC.

there are a lot of things to do. some quite entertaining, some middling and some not so good.
tracking is out on a few games, making them unplayable at times, it gets very janky. not to the point of frustration as there is lots to do.
overall with the price it is, it is worth buying as it stands.
don't think the dev is going to sort out any problems it has, as no update since last September, which is a shame this could have been great.

This is a port to Quest from PC VR "Pierhead 1" and "Pierhead 2" but both games got their arcade games mashed into this "pierhead quest" all in one new game for Meta Quest. 

The games performance runs great. The major problem with this is a lot of the "Pierhead 2" games aren't fun and there is major issues with networking for a few games if you play online it may break about 4-5 of the arcade machines (so single player or LAN will give you a better experience)

One button ball droppers or coin dropping none of those games are any good or fun. The best games are the gun or arrow projectile games, ball and basket ball throwing ones, puck sliding games, skeet ball sliding, whack a mole, the water shooting game; those are good. 

There is larger big games that are suppose to be the coolest attractions (Arrow shooting, Zombie Western Shotgun Shooting, Blaster Alien Shooting, Air Hockey, construction wrecking ball coin pusher, and Bowling), but out of those bigger attraction games, the blaster alien shooting machine broke because me and my dad were playing with online networking (so use LAN instead), the Air Hockey table completely broke I guess because of online networking the puck would freeze in place and not slide correctly, the construction wrecking ball thing is just not fun for a big attraction, and the bowling is so bad in this game you may as well play forever bowl VR just any other VR game that is dedicated to bowling is better than the bowling in this. 

AS A SINGLE PLAYER GAME or LAN multiplayer this game would be just good. Perfect for friends, family, or a date night. I can see myself playing single player and trying to hit highscores in my favorite games, or playing LAN on date night with my girlfriend to hang. 

The devs need to focus on adding way more fun games , games that rely on the dev's greatest talents towards FUN and fix the online bugs. The ticket prizes and claw machines don't seem that worth it or fun but I guess that is just me.

reviews.review_title: REAL GREAT FUN BUT ONE ISSUE
reviews.review_description: Every now or again me and my brother would be playing and then he would suddenly disconnect and it happens a lot its a shame too because we really enjoy this game hope it gets fixed

reviews.review_title: Not there yet and here’s why
reviews.review_description:
The mechanics are wildly all over the place and not accurate at all. For example: hall 2 the machine gun with crank - if I try to aim it towards the floor it flies back towards the ceiling in the opposite direction and there’s no finesse to it it’s just all over the place with zero accuracy. 

Ski ball? If the ball falls off the table and rolls onto the floor it can roll into the wall. The ball should disappear from the floor and reappear in the dispenser. 

The info for instructions just tell you how to star the game and not how to play or what you’re supposed to do. Only on the shark one were the instructions there. 

I also have zero idea how to edit my avatar in the game? 

That said:

This could be 5 stars once all the little polishing touches are put in but until then I think 3-3.5 stars is where it’s at. 

I’m not refunding because I hope that devs will improve it

developer_response.body:
The gun pivot is fixed.
You edit your avatar by the mirror in the multiplayer room, you unlock faces, hats and colours using tokens. Gloves are found in the environment.
The stars are tied to achievements which you can view in app details.

reviews.review_title: Decent game, but lacks some features!
reviews.review_description:
As one of the other reviewers mentioned, the games have 0 explanation and while some don’t need one, others may. It is more or less the same as the original game with a lot of great games added!

Textures are quite muddy, even on Quest 2, so everything kinda just looks bad, especially the decals for each machine.


This game also does not support sharing between two headsets; buyer beware if you were looking to share with someone else.

developer_response.body:
The games have a holographic info button which tells you how to play.
We didn't want to add reams of text but maybe some extra instructions are needed.
We'll see about upping the texture res.

reviews.review_description: I found out about the quest version of this game and was in the beta. The developer has worked really hard to bring this game to quest and has done an amazing job creating an arcade for VR.

Co-op has been a nightmare for me. Friend and I may finally manage to connect, load in, and only play 2 games before being disconnected, ejected, black screened, separated. Fixing the server issues or whatever would make this a fantastic game. Pretty great game solo. But I'd much rather experience it with friends.

reviews.review_title: Best arcade game in App Lab
reviews.review_description:
Get 25% off with referral link

Still wondering why this game is still in the App Lab it’s very good the best arcade game out there and you could redeem for in game prizes and play with them.

https://www.oculus. com / appreferrals/Alexxrdz/3967773476604118/?utm_source=2

Baseball game can easily get broken,multiplayer has no servers (issue with people but the game deserves more people playing),the game is a bit short and the coin pushers are too addicting but overall 10/10
